data.title: Cloud-Based Infrastructure
data.description: OpenAI utilizes a scalable cloud infrastructure to support its AI models and services.
data.technical_spec: Deployed across multiple cloud service providers for redundancy and scalability.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: The system is built on a microservices architecture to facilitate independent deployment and scaling.
data.technical_spec: Uses container orchestration platforms like Kubernetes for service management.

data.title: RESTful API Design
data.description: APIs are designed to be RESTful, allowing easy integration and interaction with other systems.
data.technical_spec: Follows standard HTTP methods and stateless communication.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Employs load balancing techniques to ensure efficient distribution of incoming requests.
data.technical_spec: Uses technologies like NGINX or AWS Elastic Load Balancing.

data.title: Data Storage Solutions
data.description: Incorporates various data storage solutions to cater to different data needs.
data.technical_spec: Combines SQL databases, NoSQL databases, and in-memory data stores like Redis.
